banner.title: About the company
banner.description: We are committed to providing pure, high-quality water with reliable delivery to every home and institution.

vision.label: Our vision 🎯
vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To be the first choice for water delivery in the region in terms of quality and trust, and to set new standards for exceptional service.

mission.label: Our mission 🎯
mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To provide pure water with easy and fast delivery that improves our customers' daily lives, while committing to social and environmental responsibility.

paragraphs.first: Sohar Water was founded to be the easiest and most reliable water delivery solution in Oman. We started from a simple idea: pure water is a right for everyone, and getting it should be free of complexity.
paragraphs.second: We are committed to delivering high-quality drinking water that meets the highest standards of safety and purity, because we believe that our community deserves only the best.

blogPage.title: Your health with water
blogPage.meta: Start your day with a glass of water 10 minutes before coffee ✨

featured.title: Your health with water
featured.description: Learn the best daily hydration habits and how they impact your energy and wellbeing throughout the day.

first.title: Modern water purification techniques: what to know
first.description: Explore the latest water purification methods used at home and how they help ensure cleaner, healthier water.

second.title: How to stay hydrated in hot weather
second.description: Practical tips to maintain your fluid balance in warm weather and keep up with your daily water needs.

first.title: How much water does your body need daily?
first.description: A complete guide to the right daily water intake based on your activity level and climate.

second.title: Does drinking water improve focus?
second.description: Discover the link between proper hydration and mental clarity, and how low water intake affects daily performance.

third.title: 5 signs you are not drinking enough water
third.description: Watch for these early warning signs to prevent dehydration and improve your overall health.

fourth.title: Best times to drink water during the day
fourth.description: Learn ideal hydration timings to boost energy, support digestion, and maintain a healthy lifestyle.

fifth.title: Can water help improve your skin?
fifth.description: Understand how hydration supports skin glow and helps reduce signs of everyday fatigue.

sixth.title: Smart ways to track your water intake
sixth.description: Simple steps and practical ideas to help you stick to your daily hydration target.

seventh.title: Cold water vs lukewarm water: what is the difference?
seventh.description: A quick comparison to help you choose what works best and when to use each option.

eighth.title: Tips to make drinking water a daily habit
eighth.description: Easy routines that turn hydration into a consistent habit without extra effort.

blogDetails.title: How many liters of water does your body need daily?

first.title: Tip One - 01!
first.description: Your daily water need varies by body weight, activity level, and climate, but the average often ranges between 2 and 3 liters, and can increase with exercise or hot weather.

second.title: Tip Two - 02!
second.description: Start your morning with a glass of water and spread your intake across the day instead of drinking large amounts at once, because consistent hydration supports focus and body function.

third.title: Tip Three - 03!
third.description: Watch urine color as a simple hydration indicator; a lighter color usually means better hydration, while a darker color may signal that you need more water.

fourth.title: Tip Four - 04!
fourth.description: If your schedule is busy, use phone reminders or a marked bottle to track intake, because small consistent habits are the easiest way to maintain hydration balance.
